channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Barcelona advances to Champions League semifinals despite first loss of the year
item.description: DORTMUND, Germany (AP) — Serhou Guirassy and Borussia Dortmund did what no else has been able to in 2025 — they beat Barcelona. It still wasn't enough to reach the Champions League semifinals.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Anthony, Magic claim 7th seed with 120-95 win over Hawks in Play-In Tournament
item.description: ORLANDO, Fla. (AP) — Cole Anthony came off the bench with 26 points and six assists to lead the Orlando Magic to a 120-95 win over the Atlanta Hawks on Tuesday night in the first game of the Play-In Tournament.
item.dc:creator: DICK SCANLON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: NFL prospect Desmond Watson, who weighs 464 pounds, looking to turn life around to make it in NFL
item.description: NFL Draft prospect Desmond Watson, who stands at 6-foot-6, 464 pounds, knows he must shed weight to fulfill his NFL dream. Watson entered college at 385 pounds in 2021.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Warriors host Memphis Grizzlies in NBA play-in game Tuesday at Chase Center
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (BCN) -- The Golden State Warriors missed a chance to clinch a National Basketball Association playoff spot in their last regular season game on Sunday but will get another chance when they host a play-in game Tuesday against the Memphis Grizzlies at Chase Center in San Francisco.
item.dc:creator: Bay City News, KRON4

item.title: Tyron Smith set to retire with Cowboys after final season with Jets, AP source says
item.description: Tyron Smith is set to retire with the Dallas Cowboys after the perennial Pro Bowl left tackle spent his final season with the New York Jets, a person with knowledge of Smith's plans said Tuesday. The Cowboys set a Wednesday announcement from Smith without providing any details.
item.dc:creator: SCHUYLER DIXON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Rory McIlroy has the Masters and a Grand Slam. That gives him freedom to chase more
item.description: AUGUSTA, Ga. (AP) — The Mount Rushmore of golf now has six faces carved into granite, and for that Rory McIlroy should feel as though he achieved the highest pinnacle in golf. But there is so much more ahead for McIlroy.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Why every MLB player will wear the same number Tuesday
item.description: Every MLB player, regardless of team or position, will be wearing the exact same jersey number on Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Addy Bink, Fox 5

item.title: Rory McIlroy wins Masters playoff to complete the career Grand Slam
item.description: AUGUSTA, Ga. (AP) — The closer Rory McIlroy came to fulfilling his lifetime dream — winning the Masters — the more it kept slipping away. Sunday at Augusta National felt like his last 11 years in the majors, blunders mixed in with sheer brilliance. A two-shot lead gone in two holes.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Garrett Crochet dazzles in return to South Side, takes no-no into the 8th in Red Sox victory
item.description: Garrett Crochet returned to the South Side with a vengeance, throwing seven and one-third innings and striking out eleven, but the Red Sox won the game 3-1 to avoid a sweep.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Fan reaches into Mike Trout's glove to snatch a catch from Angels outfielder
item.description: A fan grabbed the ball out of Mike Trout's glove after the Los Angeles Angels star reached into the right field stands Saturday night to make what appeared to be a great catch against the Houston Astros
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: White Sox face the Red Sox with 1-0 series lead
item.description: Boston Red Sox (7-8, third in the AL East) vs. Chicago White Sox (3-10, fifth in the AL Central) Chicago; Saturday, 4:10 p.m.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Augusta man attends 62 Masters in a row
item.description: For many people, they’ll wait their whole life to go to The Masters. For others, they’ve been going their whole life.
item.dc:creator: Karlton Clay, Fox 5

item.title: Blackhawks score 4 3rd-period goals for 5-2 win over Bruins
item.description: BOSTON (AP) — Nick Foligno scored a pair of goals, Arvid Soderblom made 31 saves and the Chicago Blackhawks beat the Boston Bruins 5-2 on Thursday night. Ryan Donato, Tyler Bertuzzi and Kevin Korchinski also had goals for the Blackhawks, who scored four goals in third period to pull away.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Utah HC thankful for tremendous fan support
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Although the team was officially eliminated from NHL playoff contention last night, that did not damper the mood before the Utah Hockey Club's final home game of this inaugural season Thursday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Bulls favored to land Nikola Jokic if traded, odds maker says
item.description: If the Denver Nuggets were to trade Nikola Jokic, the Chicago Bulls are the top landing spot according to Bookies.com's Adam Thompson, who gave the Bulls a +500 odds to acquire the 3-time NBA MVP.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9
